Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $515,202,542Details
International Box Office $554,749,272
Worldwide Box Office $1,069,951,814
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,804,866
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $51,699,651
Total $68,504,517
Further financial details...

Synopsis

No one’s ever really gone… Rey’s journey continues and the Skywalker saga concludes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$177,383,864 (34.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$275,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,406 opening theaters/4,406 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $672,333,887

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney
December 20th, 2019 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 18th, 2019 (Wide), released as Žvaigždžių Karai. Skaivokerio iškilimas (Lithuania)
December 18th, 2019 (Wide) (China)
December 18th, 2019 (Wide), released as Star Wars: L'ascesa di Skywalker (Italy)
December 19th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 19th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: March 17th, 2020 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi violence and action.
(Rating bulletin 2607 (Cert #52489), 12/4/2019)
Running Time: 142 minutes
Franchise: Star Wars
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair, Intertitle
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (country): England, Ireland, Jordan, United Kingdom
Filming location (locale): Ivinghoe Beacon, Buckinghamshire, England, Skellig Michael, Ireland, Wadi Rum, Jordan
Filming location (production facility): Pinewood Studios, Buckinghamshire, England
Filming location (state or county): Buckinghamshire England, County Kerry, Ireland
Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Good vs. Evil, Revenge, Robot
Social setting: Space Opera
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lucasfilm, Bad Robot, Walt Disney Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

No one’s ever really gone… Rey’s journey continues and the Skywalker saga concludes.
